name: @angflow/monorepo
description: A highly customizable Angular library for building node-based editors and interactive flow charts

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @angflow/system run build && pnpm --filter @angflow/angular run build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @angflow/system run lint && pnpm --filter @angflow/angular run lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @angflow/system run typecheck && pnpm --filter @angflow/angular run typecheck
scripts.publish:angflow: pnpm --filter @angflow/system publish --access public && pnpm --filter @angflow/angular publish --access public
